github_activity.name: GitHub Activity
github_activity.description: Sync selected GitHub repository activity locally so Magi can understand projects, pull requests, issues, reviews, commits, and CI status.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether GitHub activity sync is active.

client_id.label: GitHub Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID used for local GitHub web authorization.

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Stored locally after connecting GitHub. You can paste a token for testing.

repositories.label: Repositories
repositories.description: Repositories to sync, for example owner/repo or a GitHub repository URL.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to check GitHub for updates.

initial_sync_lookback_days.label: Initial Sync Days
initial_sync_lookback_days.description: How many recent days to import on the first sync.

activation.title: Connect GitHub
activation.description: Choose the repositories Magi should read from this device. No GitHub data is sent to a Magi cloud service.

connect_github.label: Connect GitHub
connect_github.description: Open the GitHub authorization page, enter the code, and save the resulting token locally.
